🚨 NO ZAHEER KHAN. MORNE MORKEL TO CONTINUE 🚨

- Morne Morkel's contract as Team India's bowling coach has officially ended.

- However, as per reports, the BCCI is going to extend the contract till WC 2027. https://t.co/NU4EldRZOO

2079509355033235906.full_text:
🚨 S BADRINATH ON STEPHEN FLEMING COACHING CSK🚨

S Badrinath said 🗣️,

"With the Indian youngsters coming through the ranks, a coach with great technical and tactical acumen in T20s is needed. Because you've to build a squad by picking the right players and grooming them. Just being a man-manager won't work in the current CSK setup and an actual coach is needed without MS Dhoni. A coach that does more technical work will be needed now. So it's the right decision to let Fleming go, even though it would have been hard."

SIKANDER RAZA ON VAIBHAV SOORYAVANSHI [JioStar]

"Vaibhav is a supremely talented cricketer. If a 15-year-old kid is playing international cricket, criticising him after just two or three matches isn't justified. If he is managed and handled well, I think Vaibhav could be a generational talent".

2079502369767784846.full_text: Kris Srikkanth said : "Will anyone send KL Rahul at No. 6 when chasing such a huge total? That guy has won you so much in tough run-chases. Is Rahul a No. 6 or 7 batter? Just like you screwed up Sanju Samson and Vaibhav Suryavanshi, now you are screwing up KL Rahul. This is gross injustice. His body language also looked like someone nervous yesterday." [Cheeky Cheeka]

2079557187849052228.full_text:
TILAK VARMA ON SHREYAS IYER'S CAPTAINCY:

"Honestly, if you see, Iyer bhai is leading a successful team right now. So, of course, there will be responsibilities and expectations. At the same point, there were different conditions in Ireland. If you look at the last two years, we played more matches in Asia. And after two years, we came straight to the overseas conditions, that too against a good side. England is a very good side. We all saw how they played in the semifinals."
